honest_findings_for_followup.stale_pending_in_3_clac_snapshots: BRIDGE-01, BRAIN-BLUEPRINT, INH-CODE-04 have stale PENDING values from before merge. Recommend post-merge snapshot finalize step in dispatch template OR explicit AC-naming convention for future-knowable items.
honest_findings_for_followup.brain_blueprint_section_count: BRAIN-BLUEPRINT report has fewer than 8 H2 sections — possible LAW_N5 §L5.4 conformance gap; worth Lane_03 review.
